verses.text: Israel a uk makaite aw, hih thu ngai un: Note in thutang thuman a deih dingin a kilawm hinapi-in
thuhoih deihloin thusia na deih zawsop uh hi. Note in mite' vun na hing hawkkhiat uh a, a guh uh na hing kheuh uh hi
Ka mite' sa na netum uh hi. A vun uh hawkin, a guh uh na satkham uh a, beel-a meh huan ding bangin na satnen gawp uh hi
Topa' tungah huhna ngenin na kiko hun uh hong tung ding a, ahi zongin amah in note hong dawnglo ding hi. Note gamtatsia na hih manun, na ngetna uh hong ngailo ding hi
Sum a piazo mite kiangah thunuam gen a, a pialo mite kiangah gal tuah ding a gen kamsangte in mite lam a khialsak uh hi. Topa in tua bang kamsangte kiangah

“Keima mite lam khialsak na hih manun mailam thu gentheihna maang na mu nawn kei ding uh a, mailam thu peuhmah na gen thei nawn kei ding uh hi. Kamsangte aw, note' hun beita ding a, ni in hong tumsan ta ding hi,” ci hi
Hih bang thugen kamsangte, a thugen kholhna uh Pasian in a tun'sakloh manin maizumin mindai ding uh hi
Ahi zongin kei ahih leh, Israel mite tungah a mawhna uh a genkhia dingin Topa' kha leh a vang tawh ka kidim a, thutang gen ngamna ding lungsim ka nei hi
Ngai un! Israel a uk makaite aw. Note in thutang deihloin, thuman kimlai a khialin na hei uh hi
Mi thahna leh thumanlohna tawh, Pasian' khuapi, Jerusalem na lam uh hi

Khuapi ukte in sumgolh ngahtheihna ding ngaihsutna bek tawh thu khen a, siampite in sum ngahtheihna ding ngaihsutna bek tawh thu gen a, kamsangte in zong sum ngahtheihna ding ngaihsutna bek mah tawh mailam thu genkhol uh hi. Tua bang hinapi-in amaute in Topa, muan'in nei uh a, “ Topa in eite hong ompih a, eite tungah siatna hong tunglo ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih manin note' hangin lo khawh bangin Zion kikho-in, Jerusalem, nin kipaihna phualpi hong suak ding a, biakinn omna mual, gamlak a suak ding hi.
